'''GenoHaradan mesh armor''' was a form of woven [[Armor/Legends|armor]] worn by the [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] of the [[GenoHaradan]] Assault Guild during the times of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] and [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''

==Sources==
